---
title: "Chiyoda ITED Study Report"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
execute:
  echo: true
  warning: false
---

```{python}
from pathlib import Path
import pandas as pd

from chiyoda.studies.models import StudyBundle

STUDY_DIR = Path("out/study")
bundle = StudyBundle.load(STUDY_DIR)
summary = bundle.summary[bundle.summary["record_type"] == "variant_aggregate"].copy()
summary
```

## Study Summary

Use the exported tables in `tables/` for exact values and the exported figures in `figures/` for paper-ready visuals.

## Core Figures

![](figures/01_layout_and_keyframes.png)

![](figures/02_occupancy_and_slowdown.png)

![](figures/03_bottleneck_dynamics.png)

![](figures/04_exit_and_flow.png)

![](figures/05_distributions.png)

![](figures/06_scenario_comparison.png)

## ITED Figures

![](figures/07_entropy_evolution.png)

![](figures/08_fundamental_diagram.png)

![](figures/09_belief_accuracy.png)

![](figures/10_responder_effect.png)
